prestazioni: Replace the stock 4B11T (MIVEC turbocharged) engine's turbocharger with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a divorced wastegate setup to eliminate backpressure and optimize spool on the 2.0L inline-4.

Install a HKS Hi-Power 4.1L intercooler core with a custom aluminum piping system (3.5-inch diameter) and a Mishimoto X-Line silicone coupler kit, reducing intake temps by 30°C under full boost while maintaining the stock FQ400's 400PS (395hp) output but with a flatter torque curve (450Nm from 3,500-6,500 RPM).

Upgrade the stock 6-speed F1CJC gearbox with a PPG straight-cut dog engagement kit (1st-4th gears), a billet aluminum shift fork, and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (paddle-type, 800Nm capacity) to handle the increased torque while retaining the Evo X's SST (Sportronic Shift Transmission) functionality for launch control and flat-shift tuning via an AEM Infinity 7 standalone ECU.
estetica: Fit a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom extended wheel arches to accommodate a 10mm front and 15mm rear track width increase, paired with Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (18x10.5 +15 front, 18x11 +20 rear) in Hyper Silver with titanium hardware.

Install a Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a custom 3-inch vented scoop (aligned with the HKS intercooler) and a rear carbon fiber GT wing (900mm chord, 150mm height) mounted on adjustable titanium pedestals, replacing the stock aluminum wing for reduced weight and increased downforce (250kg at 180mph).

Replace all exterior trim with a full OEM+ carbon fiber package (Vortex Generations front splitter, rear bumper lip, and side skirts) in matte clear coat, paired with a custom titanium exhaust system (Burns Stainless 3.5-inch piping with a 304 stainless steel muffler and dual 4-inch titanium tips) for weight savings and a deeper, 3,500Hz exhaust note.
